hazard.summary: Return-all pagination bursts Shopify requests and trips the 2 req/sec limit, producing 429s.
signals: Exceeded 2 calls per second for api client
429 - {"errors":"Exceeded 2 calls per second for api client. Reduce request rates to resume uninterrupted service."}

constraints: Requests to Shopify must be paced per store+credential to avoid exceeding vendor limits.
On HTTP 429, if Retry-After is present, wait at least that long before retrying.
Return-all pagination must not burst; cap concurrency or enforce sequential pacing.
verification: Reproduce with Return all enabled; observe baseline 429s.
Enable limiter + 429 handling; rerun and confirm the workflow completes and 429s drop to ~0.
Add/verify a test that simulates 429 + Retry-After and asserts pacing before retry.
notes: Classic vendor-throttle bug where a pagination loop ignores upstream pacing. Also reported to affect other Shopify nodes (e.g., order creation line-item lookups).
